// lib/presentation/pages/calendar/calendar_page.dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:lucide_icons_flutter/lucide_icons.dart';
import '../../../config/theme/app_colors.dart';
import '../../../config/theme/app_text_styles.dart';

class CalendarPage extends StatefulWidget {
  const CalendarPage({super.key});

  @override
  State<CalendarPage> createState() => _CalendarPageState();
}

class _CalendarPageState extends State<CalendarPage> {
  int _selectedIndex = 2;
  late DateTime _currentMonth;

  @override
  void initState() {
    super.initState();
    _currentMonth = DateTime.now();
  }

  void _previousMonth() {
    setState(() {
      _currentMonth =
          DateTime(_currentMonth.year, _currentMonth.month - 1, 1);
    });
  }

  void _nextMonth() {
    setState(() {
      _currentMonth =
          DateTime(_currentMonth.year, _currentMonth.month + 1, 1);
    });
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      backgroundColor: AppColors.bgPrimary,
      appBar: AppBar(
        backgroundColor: AppColors.bgWhite,
        elevation: 0,
        title: const Text('Calendar'),
        centerTitle: true,
        actions: [
          IconButton(
            icon: const Icon(LucideIcons.bell),
            color: AppColors.textDark,
            onPressed: () {
              Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/notifications');
            },
          ),
          const SizedBox(width: 8),
        ],
      ),
      body: SingleChildScrollView(
        child: Padding(
          padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16.0),
          child: Column(
            children: [
              // Month Selector
              Row(
                mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
                children: [
                  IconButton(
                    icon: const Icon(LucideIcons.chevronLeft),
                    onPressed: _previousMonth,
                  ),
                  Column(
                    children: [
                      Text(
                        _getMonthName(_currentMonth.month),
                        style: AppTextStyles.headingSmall,
                      ),
                      Text(
                        '${_currentMonth.year}',
                        style: AppTextStyles.labelMedium,
                      ),
                    ],
                  ),
                  IconButton(
                    icon: const Icon(LucideIcons.chevronRight),
                    onPressed: _nextMonth,
                  ),
                ],
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 24),

              // Calendar Grid
              Container(
                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                  color: AppColors.bgWhite,
                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                ),
                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
                child: Column(
                  children: [
                    // Day headers
                    Row(
                      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
                      children: ['Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat', 'Sun']
                          .map(
                            (day) => Expanded(
                              child: Center(
                                child: Text(
                                  day,
                                  style: AppTextStyles.labelMedium,
                                ),
                              ),
                            ),
                          )
                          .toList(),
                    ),
                    const SizedBox(height: 16),

                    // Calendar days
                    GridView.builder(
                      shrinkWrap: true,
                      physics: const NeverScrollableScrollPhysics(),
                      gridDelegate:
                          const SliverGridDelegateWithFixedCrossAxisCount(
                        crossAxisCount: 7,
                        childAspectRatio: 1.2,
                        mainAxisSpacing: 8,
                        crossAxisSpacing: 8,
                      ),
                      itemCount: 35,
                      itemBuilder: (context, index) {
                        int day = index + 1 - _getDayOffset(_currentMonth);
                        bool isCurrentMonth = day > 0 &&
                            day <=
                                _getDaysInMonth(
                                    _currentMonth.year, _currentMonth.month);

                        if (!isCurrentMonth) {
                          return Container();
                        }

                        return _buildCalendarDay(day);
                      },
                    ),
                  ],
                ),
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 24),

              // Summary Cards
              Container(
                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                  color: AppColors.successGreen.withAlpha((0.15 * 255).round()),
                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                ),
                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
                child: Row(
                  children: [
                    Container(
                      width: 50,
                      height: 50,
                      decoration: BoxDecoration(
                        color: AppColors.successGreen,
                        shape: BoxShape.circle,
                      ),
                        child: const Icon(LucideIcons.circleCheck,
                          color: AppColors.bgWhite),
                    ),
                    const SizedBox(width: 16),
                    Column(
                      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
                      children: [
                        Text(
                          'Total Day Work',
                          style: AppTextStyles.labelMedium,
                        ),
                        const SizedBox(height: 4),
                        Text(
                          '19',
                          style: AppTextStyles.displaySmall.copyWith(
                            color: AppColors.successGreen,
                          ),
                        ),
                      ],
                    ),
                  ],
                ),
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 12),

              // Total Leave
              Container(
                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                  color: AppColors.warningYellow.withAlpha((0.15 * 255).round()),
                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                ),
                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
                child: Row(
                  children: [
                    Container(
                      width: 50,
                      height: 50,
                      decoration: BoxDecoration(
                        color: AppColors.warningYellow,
                        shape: BoxShape.circle,
                      ),
                          child: const Icon(LucideIcons.umbrella,
                          color: AppColors.bgWhite),
                    ),
                    const SizedBox(width: 16),
                    Column(
                      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
                      children: [
                        Text(
                          'Total Leave',
                          style: AppTextStyles.labelMedium,
                        ),
                        const SizedBox(height: 4),
                        Text(
                          '2',
                          style: AppTextStyles.displaySmall.copyWith(
                            color: AppColors.warningYellow,
                          ),
                        ),
                      ],
                    ),
                  ],
                ),
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 12),

              // Total Absent
              Container(
                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                  color: AppColors.errorRed.withAlpha((0.15 * 255).round()),
                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                ),
                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
                child: Row(
                  children: [
                    Container(
                      width: 50,
                      height: 50,
                      decoration: BoxDecoration(
                        color: AppColors.errorRed,
                        shape: BoxShape.circle,
                      ),
                        child: const Icon(LucideIcons.circleX,
                          color: AppColors.bgWhite),
                    ),
                    const SizedBox(width: 16),
                    Column(
                      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
                      children: [
                        Text(
                          'Total Absent',
                          style: AppTextStyles.labelMedium,
                        ),
                        const SizedBox(height: 4),
                        Text(
                          '0',
                          style: AppTextStyles.displaySmall.copyWith(
                            color: AppColors.errorRed,
                          ),
                        ),
                      ],
                    ),
                  ],
                ),
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 32),
            ],
          ),
        ),
      ),
      bottomNavigationBar: BottomNavigationBar(
        type: BottomNavigationBarType.fixed,
        currentIndex: _selectedIndex,
        onTap: (index) {
          setState(() => _selectedIndex = index);
          _navigateToPage(index, context);
        },
        items: const [
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.house),
            label: 'Home',
          ),
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.wallet),
            label: 'Payment',
          ),
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.calendarDays),
            label: 'Calendar',
          ),
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.messageCircle),
            label: 'Chat',
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildCalendarDay(int day) {
    bool isToday = day == DateTime.now().day &&
        _currentMonth.month == DateTime.now().month &&
        _currentMonth.year == DateTime.now().year;

    bool isPresent = day > 0 && day <= 23 && day != 21; // Example logic
    bool isLeave = day == 21;

    Color bgColor = AppColors.bgWhite;
    Color textColor = AppColors.textDark;

    if (isPresent) {
      bgColor = AppColors.successGreen;
      textColor = AppColors.bgWhite;
    } else if (isLeave) {
      bgColor = AppColors.warningYellow;
      textColor = AppColors.bgWhite;
    }

    if (isToday) {
      bgColor = AppColors.primaryBlue;
      textColor = AppColors.bgWhite;
    }

    return Container(
      decoration: BoxDecoration(
        color: bgColor,
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
        border: isToday ? Border.all(color: AppColors.primaryBlue, width: 2) : null,
      ),
      child: Center(
        child: Text(
          '$day',
          style: AppTextStyles.labelLarge.copyWith(color: textColor),
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  int _getDayOffset(DateTime dateTime) {
    return DateTime(dateTime.year, dateTime.month, 1).weekday - 1;
  }

  int _getDaysInMonth(int year, int month) {
    if (month == 12) {
      return DateTime(year + 1, 1, 0).day;
    } else {
      return DateTime(year, month + 1, 0).day;
    }
  }

  String _getMonthName(int month) {
    const months = [
      'January',
      'February',
      'March',
      'April',
      'May',
      'June',
      'July',
      'August',
      'September',
      'October',
      'November',
      'December'
    ];
    return months[month - 1];
  }

  void _navigateToPage(int index, BuildContext context) {
    switch (index) {
      case 0:
        Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/home');
        break;
      case 1:
        Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/payment');
        break;
      case 2:
        // Already on calendar
        break;
      case 3:
        Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/chat');
        break;
    }
  }
}

===== FILE: aquas/lib/presentation/pages/chat/chat_detail_page.dart =====


===== FILE: aquas/lib/presentation/pages/chat/chat_list_page.dart =====
// lib/presentation/pages/chat/chat_list_page.dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:lucide_icons_flutter/lucide_icons.dart';
import '../../../config/theme/app_colors.dart';
import '../../../config/theme/app_text_styles.dart';

class ChatListPage extends StatefulWidget {
  const ChatListPage({super.key});

  @override
  State<ChatListPage> createState() => _ChatListPageState();
}

class _ChatListPageState extends State<ChatListPage> {
  int _selectedIndex = 3;
  bool _isRecording = false;

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      backgroundColor: AppColors.bgPrimary,
      appBar: AppBar(
        backgroundColor: AppColors.bgWhite,
        elevation: 0,
        title: const Text('Chat'),
        centerTitle: true,
        leading: IconButton(
          icon: const Icon(LucideIcons.chevronLeft),
          onPressed: () {
            Navigator.pop(context);
          },
        ),
        actions: [
          IconButton(
            icon: const Icon(LucideIcons.bell),
            color: AppColors.textDark,
            onPressed: () {
              Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/notifications');
            },
          ),
          const SizedBox(width: 8),
        ],
      ),
      body: Column(
        children: [
          Expanded(
            child: SingleChildScrollView(
              child: Padding(
                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16.0),
                child: Column(
                  children: [
                    const SizedBox(height: 12),
                    Center(
                      child: Text(
                        'Today',
                        style: AppTextStyles.labelMedium,
                      ),
                    ),
                    const SizedBox(height: 16),

                    // Sent Message (Blue)
                    _buildMessageBubble(
                      isOwn: true,
                      duration: '00:00/00:32',
                      time: '4:56 pm',
                      isSent: true,
                    ),
                    const SizedBox(height: 12),

                    // Received Message (Gray)
                    _buildMessageBubble(
                      isOwn: false,
                      duration: '00:00/00:32',
                      time: '4:56 pm',
                      isSent: false,
                    ),
                    const SizedBox(height: 12),

                    // Sent Message
                    _buildMessageBubble(
                      isOwn: true,
                      duration: '00:00/00:32',
                      time: '4:56 pm',
                      isSent: true,
                    ),
                  ],
                ),
              ),
            ),
          ),

          // Message Input Area
          Padding(
            padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16.0),
            child: Center(
              child: GestureDetector(
                onLongPress: () {
                  setState(() => _isRecording = true);
                },
                onLongPressEnd: (_) {
                  setState(() => _isRecording = false);
                },
                child: Container(
                  width: 80,
                  height: 80,
                  decoration: BoxDecoration(
                    shape: BoxShape.circle,
                    color: AppColors.primaryBlue,
                    boxShadow: [
                      BoxShadow(
                        color: AppColors.primaryBlue.withAlpha((0.3 * 255).round()),
                        blurRadius: 12,
                        offset: const Offset(0, 4),
                      ),
                    ],
                  ),
                  child: Icon(
                    _isRecording ? LucideIcons.circleStop : LucideIcons.mic,
                    color: AppColors.bgWhite,
                    size: 32,
                  ),
                ),
              ),
            ),
          ),
          const SizedBox(height: 16),
        ],
      ),
      bottomNavigationBar: BottomNavigationBar(
        type: BottomNavigationBarType.fixed,
        currentIndex: _selectedIndex,
        onTap: (index) {
          setState(() => _selectedIndex = index);
          _navigateToPage(index, context);
        },
        items: const [
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.house),
            label: 'Home',
          ),
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.wallet),
            label: 'Payment',
          ),
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.calendarDays),
            label: 'Calendar',
          ),
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.messageCircle),
            label: 'Chat',
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildMessageBubble({
    required bool isOwn,
    required String duration,
    required String time,
    required bool isSent,
  }) {
    return Row(
      mainAxisAlignment:
          isOwn ? MainAxisAlignment.end : MainAxisAlignment.start,
      children: [
        if (!isOwn) const SizedBox(width: 8),
        Container(
          constraints: BoxConstraints(
            maxWidth: MediaQuery.of(context).size.width * 0.7,
          ),
          decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: isOwn
            ? AppColors.primaryBlue
            : AppColors.textLight.withAlpha((0.2 * 255).round()),
            borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
          ),
          padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
          child: Column(
            crossAxisAlignment:
                isOwn ? CrossAxisAlignment.end : CrossAxisAlignment.start,
            children: [
              Row(
                mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
                children: [
                  Icon(
                    LucideIcons.play,
                    color: isOwn ? AppColors.bgWhite : AppColors.textDark,
                    size: 20,
                  ),
                  const SizedBox(width: 8),
                  Container(
                    width: 120,
                    height: 30,
                    decoration: BoxDecoration(
                        color: isOwn
                          ? AppColors.primaryBlue.withAlpha((0.3 * 255).round())
                          : AppColors.textGray.withAlpha((0.3 * 255).round()),
                      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4),
                    ),
                    child: Stack(
                      children: [
                        Positioned(
                          left: 4,
                          top: 6,
                          child: Row(
                            children: List.generate(
                              15,
                              (_) => Container(
                                width: 2,
                                height: 8,
                                margin:
                                    const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 2),
                                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                                  color: isOwn
                                      ? AppColors.bgWhite
                                      : AppColors.textDark,
                                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(1),
                                ),
                              ),
                            ),
                          ),
                        ),
                      ],
                    ),
                  ),
                ],
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 6),
              Text(
                duration,
                style: AppTextStyles.labelSmall.copyWith(
                  color:
                      isOwn ? AppColors.bgWhite : AppColors.textDark,
                ),
              ),
            ],
          ),
        ),
        if (isOwn) const SizedBox(width: 8),
        Padding(
          padding: const EdgeInsets.only(left: 8, right: 8),
          child: Column(
            children: [
              Text(
                time,
                style: AppTextStyles.labelSmall,
              ),
              if (isSent)
                const Icon(
                  LucideIcons.checkCheck,
                  size: 14,
                  color: AppColors.primaryBlue,
                ),
            ],
          ),
        ),
      ],
    );
  }

  void _navigateToPage(int index, BuildContext context) {
    switch (index) {
      case 0:
        Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/home');
        break;
      case 1:
        Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/payment');
        break;
      case 2:
        Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/calendar');
        break;
      case 3:
        // Already on chat
        break;
    }
  }
}

===== FILE: aquas/lib/presentation/pages/home/home_idle_state.dart =====


===== FILE: aquas/lib/presentation/pages/home/home_on_leave_state.dart =====


===== FILE: aquas/lib/presentation/pages/home/home_page.dart =====
// lib/presentation/pages/home/home_page.dart

import 'dart:async';
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:lucide_icons_flutter/lucide_icons.dart';
import '../../../config/theme/app_colors.dart';
import '../../../config/theme/app_text_styles.dart';

class HomePage extends StatefulWidget {
  const HomePage({super.key});

  @override
  State<HomePage> createState() => _HomePageState();
}

class _HomePageState extends State<HomePage> {
  int _selectedIndex = 0;
  bool _isWorking = false;
  bool _isOnLeave = false;
  bool _hasCheckedIn = false;
  bool _isSiteFinished = false;
  late DateTime _workStartTime;
  late Duration _elapsedTime;
  late Timer _timer;
  final int _totalDaysWorked = 19;
  double _totalHoursWorked = 64.0;

  @override
  void initState() {
    super.initState();
    _elapsedTime = Duration.zero;
  }

  @override
  void dispose() {
    if (_timer.isActive) {
      _timer.cancel();
    }
    super.dispose();
  }

  void _checkIn() {
    setState(() {
      _hasCheckedIn = true;
      _isWorking = false;
      _elapsedTime = Duration.zero;
    });

    ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
      const SnackBar(
        content: Text('Check-in successful. Attendance marked for today.'),
        backgroundColor: AppColors.successGreen,
      ),
    );
  }

  void _startWork() {
    setState(() {
      _isWorking = true;
      _workStartTime = DateTime.now();
      _elapsedTime = Duration.zero;
    });

    _timer = Timer.periodic(const Duration(seconds: 1), (_) {
      setState(() {
        _elapsedTime = DateTime.now().difference(_workStartTime);
      });
    });
  }

  void _stopWork() {
    if (_timer.isActive) {
      _timer.cancel();
    }
    
    _showHoursSelectionDialog();
  }

  void _showHoursSelectionDialog() {
    double selectedHours = (_elapsedTime.inMinutes / 60.0).ceilToDouble();
    if (selectedHours < 0.5) selectedHours = 0.5;

    showDialog(
      context: context,
      barrierDismissible: false,
      builder: (BuildContext context) {
        return StatefulBuilder(
          builder: (context, setDialogState) {
            return AlertDialog(
              backgroundColor: AppColors.bgWhite,
              title: const Text(
                'Select Hours Worked',
                style: TextStyle(
                  fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                  color: AppColors.textDark,
                  fontFamily: 'Poppins',
                ),
              ),
              content: Column(
                mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
                children: [
                  const SizedBox(height: 16),
                  // Hours display
                  Container(
                    padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16),
                    decoration: BoxDecoration(
                      color: AppColors.bgGray,
                      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                    ),
                    child: Center(
                      child: Column(
                        children: [
                          Text(
                            '${selectedHours.toStringAsFixed(1)} hrs',
                            style: AppTextStyles.displayLarge.copyWith(
                              fontSize: 36,
                              color: AppColors.primaryBlue,
                            ),
                          ),
                          const SizedBox(height: 8),
                          Text(
                            'Hours worked today',
                            style: AppTextStyles.labelMedium.copyWith(
                              color: AppColors.textGray,
                            ),
                          ),
                        ],
                      ),
                    ),
                  ),
                  const SizedBox(height: 20),
                  // Slider
                  Slider(
                    value: selectedHours,
                    min: 0.5,
                    max: 12.0,
                    divisions: 23,
                    activeColor: AppColors.primaryBlue,
                    inactiveColor: AppColors.bgGray,
                    label: '${selectedHours.toStringAsFixed(1)} hrs',
                    onChanged: (value) {
                      setDialogState(() {
                        selectedHours = (value * 2).roundToDouble() / 2;
                      });
                    },
                  ),
                  const SizedBox(height: 16),
                  // Quick buttons
                  SingleChildScrollView(
                    scrollDirection: Axis.horizontal,
                    child: Row(
                      children: [
                        _buildQuickHourButton(
                          '2',
                          2.0,
                          selectedHours,
                          (val) => setDialogState(() => selectedHours = val),
                        ),
                        const SizedBox(width: 8),
                        _buildQuickHourButton(
                          '4',
                          4.0,
                          selectedHours,
                          (val) => setDialogState(() => selectedHours = val),
                        ),
                        const SizedBox(width: 8),
                        _buildQuickHourButton(
                          '6',
                          6.0,
                          selectedHours,
                          (val) => setDialogState(() => selectedHours = val),
                        ),
                        const SizedBox(width: 8),
                        _buildQuickHourButton(
                          '8',
                          8.0,
                          selectedHours,
                          (val) => setDialogState(() => selectedHours = val),
                        ),
                      ],
                    ),
                  ),
                ],
              ),
              actions: [
                TextButton(
                  onPressed: () {
                    Navigator.of(context).pop();
                    setState(() {
                      _isWorking = false;
                    });
                  },
                  child: const Text(
                    'Cancel',
                    style: TextStyle(color: AppColors.textGray),
                  ),
                ),
                ElevatedButton(
                  onPressed: () {
                    // Save hours to database
                    _saveWorkSession(selectedHours);
                    Navigator.of(context).pop();
                    setState(() {
                      _isWorking = false;
                      _hasCheckedIn = false;
                      _totalHoursWorked += selectedHours;
                    });
                    
                    ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
                      SnackBar(
                        content: Text(
                          'Work session saved: ${selectedHours.toStringAsFixed(1)} hours',
                        ),
                        backgroundColor: AppColors.successGreen,
                      ),
                    );
                  },
                  style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                    backgroundColor: AppColors.primaryBlue,
                  ),
                  child: const Text(
                    'Done',
                    style: TextStyle(color: AppColors.bgWhite),
                  ),
                ),
              ],
            );
          },
        );
      },
    );
  }

  Widget _buildQuickHourButton(
    String label,
    double hours,
    double selectedHours,
    Function(double) onTap,
  ) {
    bool isSelected = (selectedHours - hours).abs() < 0.01;
    return GestureDetector(
      onTap: () => onTap(hours),
      child: Container(
        padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 8),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: isSelected ? AppColors.primaryBlue : AppColors.bgGray,
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
          border: Border.all(
            color: isSelected ? AppColors.primaryBlue : AppColors.bgGray,
            width: 2,
          ),
        ),
        child: Text(
          '$label hrs',
          style: TextStyle(
            color: isSelected ? AppColors.bgWhite : AppColors.textDark,
            fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
            fontSize: 12,
          ),
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  void _saveWorkSession(double hours) {
    // TODO: Integrate with backend API to save work session
    // This would call the data service to save:
    // - Date of work
    // - Hours worked
    // - Check-out location
    // Example:
    // await _dataService.saveWorkSession(
    //   date: DateTime.now(),
    //   hours: hours,
    //   location: currentLocation,
    // );
  }

  void _siteFinished() {
    setState(() {
      _isSiteFinished = true;
      _isWorking = false;
      _hasCheckedIn = false;
    });

    if (_timer.isActive) {
      _timer.cancel();
    }

    ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
      const SnackBar(
        content: Text('Site marked as finished'),
        backgroundColor: AppColors.errorRed,
      ),
    );
  }

  void _takeLeave() {
    setState(() {
      _isOnLeave = true;
      _isWorking = false;
      _hasCheckedIn = false;
    });

    if (_timer.isActive) {
      _timer.cancel();
    }

    ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
      const SnackBar(
        content: Text('Leave marked successfully'),
        backgroundColor: AppColors.warningYellow,
      ),
    );
  }

  void _endLeave() {
    setState(() {
      _isOnLeave = false;
      _isSiteFinished = false;
    });

    ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
      const SnackBar(
        content: Text('Leave ended'),
        backgroundColor: AppColors.successGreen,
      ),
    );
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      backgroundColor: AppColors.bgPrimary,
      appBar: AppBar(
        backgroundColor: AppColors.bgWhite,
        elevation: 0,
        title: Column(
          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
          children: const [
            Text(
              'Hello,',
              style: TextStyle(
                fontSize: 14,
                color: AppColors.textGray,
                fontFamily: 'Poppins',
              ),
            ),
            Text(
              'Ramesh!',
              style: TextStyle(
                fontSize: 24,
                fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                color: AppColors.textDark,
                fontFamily: 'Poppins',
              ),
            ),
          ],
        ),
        centerTitle: false,
        actions: [
          IconButton(
            icon: const Icon(LucideIcons.bell),
            color: AppColors.textDark,
            onPressed: () {
              Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/notifications');
            },
          ),
          const SizedBox(width: 8),
        ],
      ),
      body: SingleChildScrollView(
        child: Padding(
          padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16.0),
          child: Column(
            crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
            children: [
              // Hours Worked Card
              _buildInfoCard(
                icon: LucideIcons.clock,
                title: 'Total Hours Worked',
                value: '${_totalHoursWorked.toStringAsFixed(0)}hr',
                date: _formatDate(DateTime.now()),
                backgroundColor: AppColors.bgWhite,
                iconColor: AppColors.infoBlue,
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 16),

              // Number of Days Card
              _buildInfoCard(
                icon: LucideIcons.calendarDays,
                title: 'Total Number of Days',
                value: '$_totalDaysWorked',
                date: _formatDate(DateTime.now()),
                backgroundColor: AppColors.bgWhite,
                iconColor: AppColors.primaryBlue,
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 16),

              // Timer Display (only shown when working or checked in)
              if (_hasCheckedIn || _isWorking)
                Container(
                  width: double.infinity,
                  padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16),
                  decoration: BoxDecoration(
                    color: AppColors.bgGray,
                    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                  ),
                  child: Column(
                    children: [
                      Text(
                        _formatDuration(_elapsedTime),
                        style: AppTextStyles.displayLarge.copyWith(
                          fontSize: 40,
                        ),
                      ),
                      const SizedBox(height: 4),
                      Text(
                        'Time elapsed',
                        style: AppTextStyles.labelMedium,
                      ),
                    ],
                  ),
                ),
              const SizedBox(height: 16),

              // Action Buttons - Based on state
              if (_isOnLeave) ...[
                // Leave State
                SizedBox(
                  width: double.infinity,
                  child: ElevatedButton(
                    onPressed: _endLeave,
                    style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                      backgroundColor: AppColors.warningYellow,
                      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 14),
                      shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
                        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                      ),
                    ),
                    child: Text(
                      'End Leave - 01 Day',
                      style: AppTextStyles.buttonLarge.copyWith(
                        color: AppColors.bgWhite,
                      ),
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
              ] else if (_hasCheckedIn && !_isWorking && !_isSiteFinished) ...[
                // After Check-In: Show Start Work button
                SizedBox(
                  width: double.infinity,
                  child: ElevatedButton(
                    onPressed: _startWork,
                    style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                      backgroundColor: AppColors.successGreen,
                      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 14),
                      shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
                        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                      ),
                    ),
                    child: Row(
                      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
                      children: const [
                        Icon(LucideIcons.play, color: AppColors.bgWhite),
                        SizedBox(width: 8),
                        Text(
                          'Start Work',
                          style: TextStyle(
                            fontSize: 16,
                            fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                            color: AppColors.bgWhite,
                            fontFamily: 'Poppins',
                          ),
                        ),
                      ],
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
              ] else if (_isWorking) ...[
                // Working State: Show Stop Work button
                SizedBox(
                  width: double.infinity,
                  child: ElevatedButton(
                    onPressed: _stopWork,
                    style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                      backgroundColor: AppColors.errorRed,
                      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 14),
                      shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
                        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                      ),
                    ),
                    child: Row(
                      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
                      children: const [
                        Icon(LucideIcons.squareX, color: AppColors.bgWhite),
                        SizedBox(width: 8),
                        Text(
                          'Stop Work',
                          style: TextStyle(
                            fontSize: 16,
                            fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                            color: AppColors.bgWhite,
                            fontFamily: 'Poppins',
                          ),
                        ),
                      ],
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
              ] else if (_isSiteFinished) ...[
                // Site Finished: Show disabled buttons
                SizedBox(
                  width: double.infinity,
                  child: ElevatedButton(
                    onPressed: null,
                    style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                      backgroundColor: AppColors.bgGray,
                      disabledBackgroundColor: AppColors.bgGray,
                      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 14),
                      shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
                        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                      ),
                    ),
                    child: const Text(
                      'Check In',
                      style: TextStyle(
                        fontSize: 16,
                        fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                        color: AppColors.textGray,
                        fontFamily: 'Poppins',
                      ),
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
                const SizedBox(height: 12),
                SizedBox(
                  width: double.infinity,
                  child: ElevatedButton(
                    onPressed: null,
                    style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                      backgroundColor: AppColors.bgGray,
                      disabledBackgroundColor: AppColors.bgGray,
                      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 14),
                      shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
                        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                      ),
                    ),
                    child: const Text(
                      'Site Finished',
                      style: TextStyle(
                        fontSize: 16,
                        fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                        color: AppColors.textGray,
                        fontFamily: 'Poppins',
                      ),
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
                const SizedBox(height: 12),
                SizedBox(
                  width: double.infinity,
                  child: ElevatedButton(
                    onPressed: null,
                    style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                      backgroundColor: AppColors.bgGray,
                      disabledBackgroundColor: AppColors.bgGray,
                      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 14),
                      shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
                        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                      ),
                    ),
                    child: const Text(
                      'Take leave',
                      style: TextStyle(
                        fontSize: 16,
                        fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                        color: AppColors.textGray,
                        fontFamily: 'Poppins',
                      ),
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
              ] else ...[
                // Initial State: Show three action buttons
                // Check In Button (Blue)
                SizedBox(
                  width: double.infinity,
                  child: ElevatedButton(
                    onPressed: _checkIn,
                    style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                      backgroundColor: AppColors.primaryBlue,
                      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 14),
                      shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
                        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                      ),
                    ),
                    child: Row(
                      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
                      children: const [
                        Icon(LucideIcons.play, color: AppColors.bgWhite),
                        SizedBox(width: 8),
                        Text(
                          'Check In',
                          style: TextStyle(
                            fontSize: 16,
                            fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                            color: AppColors.bgWhite,
                            fontFamily: 'Poppins',
                          ),
                        ),
                      ],
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
                const SizedBox(height: 12),

                // Site Finished Button (Red)
                SizedBox(
                  width: double.infinity,
                  child: ElevatedButton(
                    onPressed: _siteFinished,
                    style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                      backgroundColor: AppColors.errorRed,
                      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 14),
                      shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
                        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                      ),
                    ),
                    child: const Text(
                      'Site Finished',
                      style: TextStyle(
                        fontSize: 16,
                        fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                        color: AppColors.bgWhite,
                        fontFamily: 'Poppins',
                      ),
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
                const SizedBox(height: 12),

                // Take Leave Button (Yellow)
                SizedBox(
                  width: double.infinity,
                  child: ElevatedButton(
                    onPressed: _takeLeave,
                    style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                      backgroundColor: AppColors.warningYellow,
                      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 14),
                      shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
                        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                      ),
                    ),
                    child: const Text(
                      'Take leave',
                      style: TextStyle(
                        fontSize: 16,
                        fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                        color: AppColors.bgWhite,
                        fontFamily: 'Poppins',
                      ),
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
              ],
            ],
          ),
        ),
      ),
      bottomNavigationBar: BottomNavigationBar(
        type: BottomNavigationBarType.fixed,
        currentIndex: _selectedIndex,
        onTap: (index) {
          setState(() => _selectedIndex = index);
          _navigateToPage(index, context);
        },
        items: const [
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.house),
            label: 'Home',
          ),
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.wallet),
            label: 'Payment',
          ),
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.calendarDays),
            label: 'Calendar',
          ),
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.messageCircle),
            label: 'Chat',
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildInfoCard({
    required IconData icon,
    required String title,
    required String value,
    required String date,
    required Color backgroundColor,
    required Color iconColor,
  }) {
    return Container(
            decoration: BoxDecoration(
        color: backgroundColor,
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
      ),
      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
      child: Row(
        children: [
          Container(
            width: 50,
            height: 50,
            decoration: BoxDecoration(
              color: iconColor.withAlpha((0.1 * 255).round()),
              shape: BoxShape.circle,
            ),
            child: Icon(icon, color: iconColor),
          ),
          const SizedBox(width: 16),
          Expanded(
            child: Column(
              crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
              children: [
                Text(
                  title,
                  style: AppTextStyles.labelMedium,
                ),
                const SizedBox(height: 4),
                Text(
                  value,
                  style: AppTextStyles.displaySmall,
                ),
              ],
            ),
          ),
          Text(
            date,
            style: AppTextStyles.labelSmall,
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  String _formatDate(DateTime date) {
    return '${date.day} - ${_monthName(date.month)}';
  }

  String _monthName(int month) {
    const months = [
      'January',
      'February',
      'March',
      'April',
      'May',
      'June',
      'July',
      'August',
      'September',
      'October',
      'November',
      'December'
    ];
    return months[month - 1];
  }

  String _formatDuration(Duration duration) {
    int hours = duration.inHours;
    int minutes = duration.inMinutes.remainder(60);
    int seconds = duration.inSeconds.remainder(60);
    return '${hours.toString().padLeft(2, '0')}:${minutes.toString().padLeft(2, '0')}:${seconds.toString().padLeft(2, '0')}';
  }

  void _navigateToPage(int index, BuildContext context) {
    switch (index) {
      case 0:
        // Already on home
        break;
      case 1:
        Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/payment');
        break;
      case 2:
        Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/calendar');
        break;
      case 3:
        Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/chat');
        break;
    }
  }
}

// lib/presentation/pages/location/location_permission_page.dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:lucide_icons_flutter/lucide_icons.dart';
import '../../../config/theme/app_colors.dart';
import '../../../config/theme/app_text_styles.dart';

class LocationPermissionPage extends StatelessWidget {
  const LocationPermissionPage({super.key});

  void _handleAllowLocation(BuildContext context) {
    // TODO: Request location permission
    Navigator.of(context).pushReplacementNamed('/home');
  }

  void _handleSkipLocation(BuildContext context) {
    Navigator.of(context).pushReplacementNamed('/home');
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      backgroundColor: AppColors.bgPrimary,
      body: SafeArea(
        child: Padding(
          padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24.0),
          child: Column(
            mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
            children: [
              const SizedBox(height: 40),
              
              // Location Icon
              Container(
                width: 140,
                height: 140,
                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                  color: AppColors.successGreen.withAlpha((0.1 * 255).round()),
                  shape: BoxShape.circle,
                ),
                child: Center(
                  child: Container(
                    width: 100,
                    height: 100,
                    decoration: BoxDecoration(
                      color: AppColors.successGreen.withAlpha((0.2 * 255).round()),
                      shape: BoxShape.circle,
                    ),
                    child: Center(
                      child: Container(
                        width: 70,
                        height: 70,
                        decoration: BoxDecoration(
                          color: AppColors.warningYellow,
                          shape: BoxShape.circle,
                        ),
                        child: const Icon(
                          LucideIcons.mapPin,
                          color: AppColors.bgWhite,
                          size: 40,
                        ),
                      ),
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
              ),
              
              const SizedBox(height: 40),
              
              // Title
              Text(
                'Location',
                style: AppTextStyles.headingLarge,
                textAlign: TextAlign.center,
              ),
              
              const SizedBox(height: 16),
              
              // Description
              Text(
                'Allow maps to access your location whiloe you use the app?',
                style: AppTextStyles.bodyMedium.copyWith(
                  color: AppColors.textGray,
                ),
                textAlign: TextAlign.center,
              ),
              
              const SizedBox(height: 60),
              
              // Allow Button
              SizedBox(
                width: double.infinity,
                child: ElevatedButton(
                  onPressed: () => _handleAllowLocation(context),
                  style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                    backgroundColor: AppColors.primaryBlue,
                    padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 14),
                  ),
                  child: Text(
                    'Allow',
                    style: AppTextStyles.buttonLarge,
                  ),
                ),
              ),
              
              const SizedBox(height: 12),
              
              // Skip Button
              SizedBox(
                width: double.infinity,
                child: OutlinedButton(
                  onPressed: () => _handleSkipLocation(context),
                  style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(
                    foregroundColor: AppColors.primaryBlue,
                    side: const BorderSide(
                      color: AppColors.primaryBlue,
                      width: 2,
                    ),
                    padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 14),
                  ),
                  child: Text(
                    'Skip for now',
                    style: AppTextStyles.buttonLarge.copyWith(
                      color: AppColors.primaryBlue,
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
              ),
              
              const SizedBox(height: 40),
            ],
          ),
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}

// lib/presentation/pages/notification/notification_page.dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:lucide_icons_flutter/lucide_icons.dart';
import '../../../config/theme/app_colors.dart';
import '../../../config/theme/app_text_styles.dart';

class NotificationPage extends StatelessWidget {
  const NotificationPage({super.key});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      backgroundColor: AppColors.bgPrimary,
      appBar: AppBar(
        backgroundColor: AppColors.bgWhite,
        elevation: 0,
        title: const Text('Notification'),
        centerTitle: true,
        leading: IconButton(
          icon: const Icon(LucideIcons.chevronLeft),
          onPressed: () {
            Navigator.pop(context);
          },
        ),
      ),
      body: SingleChildScrollView(
        child: Padding(
          padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16.0),
          child: Column(
            crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
            children: [
              const SizedBox(height: 12),

              // Notification Item 1
              _buildNotificationItem(
                icon: LucideIcons.circleCheck,
                iconColor: AppColors.successGreen,
                title: 'Task Added',
                description: '12 tasks have been added to your daily tasks.',
                timeAgo: '1 min',
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 12),

              // Notification Item 2
              _buildNotificationItem(
                icon: LucideIcons.clock,
                iconColor: AppColors.warningYellow,
                title: '01 Pending task',
                description: 'Usability Testing',
                timeAgo: '15 min',
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 32),

              // Clear All Button
              SizedBox(
                width: double.infinity,
                child: OutlinedButton(
                  onPressed: () {
                    ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
                      const SnackBar(
                        content: Text('All notifications cleared'),
                        backgroundColor: AppColors.successGreen,
                      ),
                    );
                  },
                  style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(
                    foregroundColor: AppColors.primaryBlue,
                    side: const BorderSide(color: AppColors.primaryBlue, width: 2),
                    padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 14),
                  ),
                  child: Text(
                    'Clear all',
                    style: AppTextStyles.buttonLarge.copyWith(
                      color: AppColors.primaryBlue,
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
              ),
            ],
          ),
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildNotificationItem({
    required IconData icon,
    required Color iconColor,
    required String title,
    required String description,
    required String timeAgo,
  }) {
    return Container(
      decoration: BoxDecoration(
        color: AppColors.bgWhite,
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
      ),
      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
      child: Row(
        children: [
          Container(
            width: 50,
            height: 50,
            decoration: BoxDecoration(
              color: iconColor.withAlpha((0.15 * 255).round()),
              shape: BoxShape.circle,
            ),
            child: Icon(icon, color: iconColor),
          ),
          const SizedBox(width: 16),
          Expanded(
            child: Column(
              crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
              children: [
                Text(
                  title,
                  style: AppTextStyles.titleSmall,
                ),
                const SizedBox(height: 4),
                Text(
                  description,
                  style: AppTextStyles.bodySmall.copyWith(
                    color: AppColors.textGray,
                  ),
                  maxLines: 1,
                  overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
                ),
              ],
            ),
          ),
          Text(
            timeAgo,
            style: AppTextStyles.labelSmall,
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

class PaymentPage extends StatefulWidget {

  @override
  State<PaymentPage> createState() => _PaymentPageState();
}

class _PaymentPageState extends State<PaymentPage> {
  int _selectedIndex = 1;

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      backgroundColor: AppColors.bgPrimary,
      appBar: AppBar(
        backgroundColor: AppColors.bgWhite,
        elevation: 0,
        title: const Text('Payment'),

          ),

        ],
      ),
      body: SingleChildScrollView(

              // Total Earnings Card

                title: 'Total Earnings',

              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 16),

                  onPressed: () {
                    Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/salary-slips');

                amount: '₹1,000.00',

                backgroundColor: AppColors.successGreen.withAlpha((0.15 * 255).round()),
                textColor: AppColors.textDark,
                iconColor: AppColors.successGreen,
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 12),

              // Overtime Card
              _buildPaymentCard(
                title: 'Overtime',
                amount: '₹200.00',
                icon: LucideIcons.clock,
                backgroundColor: AppColors.infoBlue.withAlpha((0.15 * 255).round()),
                textColor: AppColors.textDark,
                iconColor: AppColors.infoBlue,
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 12),

              // Advance Payment Card
              _buildPaymentCard(
                title: 'Advance Payment',
                amount: '₹ 0.00',
                icon: LucideIcons.creditCard,
                backgroundColor: AppColors.warningYellow.withAlpha((0.15 * 255).round()),
                textColor: AppColors.textDark,
                iconColor: AppColors.warningYellow,
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 12),

              // Fine Card
              _buildPaymentCard(
                title: 'Fine',
                amount: '₹ 0.00',
                icon: LucideIcons.circleAlert,
                backgroundColor: AppColors.errorRed.withAlpha((0.15 * 255).round()),
                textColor: AppColors.textDark,
                iconColor: AppColors.errorRed,
              ),
              const SizedBox(height: 32),
            ],
          ),
        ),
      ),
      bottomNavigationBar: BottomNavigationBar(
        type: BottomNavigationBarType.fixed,
        currentIndex: _selectedIndex,
        onTap: (index) {
          setState(() => _selectedIndex = index);
          _navigateToPage(index, context);
        },
        items: const [
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.house),
            label: 'Home',
          ),
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.wallet),
            label: 'Payment',
          ),
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.calendarDays),
            label: 'Calendar',
          ),
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(LucideIcons.messageCircle),
            label: 'Chat',
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildPaymentCard({
    required String title,
    required String amount,
    required IconData icon,
    required Color backgroundColor,
    required Color textColor,
    Color? iconColor,
  }) {
    return Container(
      decoration: BoxDecoration(
        color: backgroundColor,
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
      ),
      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
      child: Row(
        children: [
          Container(
            width: 50,
            height: 50,
            decoration: BoxDecoration(
              color: (iconColor ?? textColor).withAlpha((0.2 * 255).round()),
              shape: BoxShape.circle,
            ),
            child: Icon(
              icon,
              color: iconColor ?? textColor,
            ),
          ),
          const SizedBox(width: 16),
          Expanded(
            child: Column(
              crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
              children: [
                Text(
                  title,
                  style: AppTextStyles.labelMedium.copyWith(
                    color: AppColors.textGray,
                  ),
                ),
                const SizedBox(height: 4),
                Text(
                  amount,
                  style: AppTextStyles.displaySmall.copyWith(
                    color: textColor,
                  ),
                ),
              ],
            ),
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  void _navigateToPage(int index, BuildContext context) {
    switch (index) {
      case 0:
        Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/home');
        break;
      case 1:
        // Already on payment
        break;
      case 2:
        Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/calendar');
        break;
      case 3:
        Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/chat');
        break;
    }
  }
}

===== FILE: aquas/lib/presentation/pages/payment/salary_slips_page.dart =====
// lib/presentation/pages/payment/salary_slips_page.dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:lucide_icons_flutter/lucide_icons.dart';
import '../../../config/theme/app_colors.dart';
import '../../../config/theme/app_text_styles.dart';

class SalarySlipsPage extends StatefulWidget {
  const SalarySlipsPage({super.key});

  @override
  State<SalarySlipsPage> createState() => _SalarySlipsPageState();
}

class _SalarySlipsPageState extends State<SalarySlipsPage>
    with SingleTickerProviderStateMixin {
  late TabController _tabController;

  @override
  void initState() {
    super.initState();
    _tabController = TabController(length: 2, vsync: this);
  }

  @override
  void dispose() {
    _tabController.dispose();
    super.dispose();
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      backgroundColor: AppColors.bgPrimary,
      appBar: AppBar(
        backgroundColor: AppColors.bgWhite,
        elevation: 0,
        title: const Text('Salary Slips'),
        centerTitle: true,
        leading: IconButton(
          icon: const Icon(LucideIcons.chevronLeft),
          onPressed: () {
            Navigator.pop(context);
          },
        ),
        actions: [
          IconButton(
            icon: const Icon(LucideIcons.bell),
            color: AppColors.textDark,
            onPressed: () {
              Navigator.of(context).pushNamed('/notifications');
            },
          ),
          const SizedBox(width: 8),
        ],
      ),
      body: SingleChildScrollView(
        child: Column(
          children: [
            // Year Tabs
            TabBar(
              controller: _tabController,
              indicatorColor: AppColors.primaryBlue,
              labelColor: AppColors.primaryBlue,
              unselectedLabelColor: AppColors.textGray,
              tabs: const [
                Padding(
                  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 12),
                  child: Text('This year 2025'),
                ),
                Padding(
                  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 12),
                  child: Text('2024'),
                ),
              ],
            ),

            SizedBox(
              height: MediaQuery.of(context).size.height - 200,
              child: TabBarView(
                controller: _tabController,
                children: [
                  // 2025 Slips
                  _buildSalarySlipsList(
                    slips: [
                      _SalarySlipData(
                        title: 'Total Amount Paid',
                        amount: '₹1,000.00',
                        date: '01 June',
                      ),
                      _SalarySlipData(
                        title: 'Refund Issued',
                        amount: '₹200.00',
                        date: '01 May',
                      ),
                      _SalarySlipData(
                        title: 'Discount Applied',
                        amount: '₹150.00',
                        date: '01 April',
                      ),
                      _SalarySlipData(
                        title: 'Late Fee',
                        amount: '₹50.00',
                        date: '01 March',
                      ),
                      _SalarySlipData(
                        title: 'Additional Charges',
                        amount: '₹300.00',
                        date: '01 February',
                      ),
                      _SalarySlipData(
                        title: 'Balance Due',
                        amount: '₹500.00',
                        date: '01 January',
                      ),
                    ],
                  ),

                  // 2024 Slips
                  _buildSalarySlipsList(
                    slips: [
                      _SalarySlipData(
                        title: 'Total Amount Paid',
                        amount: '₹1,000.00',
                        date: '01 June',
                      ),
                      _SalarySlipData(
                        title: 'Refund Issued',
                        amount: '₹200.00',
                        date: '01 May',
                      ),
                    ],
                  ),
                ],
              ),
            ),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSalarySlipsList({required List<_SalarySlipData> slips}) {
    return ListView.builder(
      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
      itemCount: slips.length,
      itemBuilder: (context, index) {
        final slip = slips[index];
        return Padding(
          padding: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 12),
          child: _buildSalarySlipItem(
            title: slip.title,
            amount: slip.amount,
            date: slip.date,
          ),
        );
      },
    );
  }

  Widget _buildSalarySlipItem({
    required String title,
    required String amount,
    required String date,
  }) {
    return Container(
      decoration: BoxDecoration(
        color: AppColors.bgWhite,
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
      ),
      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
      child: Row(
        children: [
          Container(
            width: 50,
            height: 50,
            decoration: BoxDecoration(
              color: AppColors.primaryBlue.withAlpha((0.15 * 255).round()),
              shape: BoxShape.circle,
            ),
            child: const Icon(
              LucideIcons.receiptText,
              color: AppColors.primaryBlue,
            ),
          ),
          const SizedBox(width: 16),
          Expanded(
            child: Column(
              crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
              children: [
                Text(
                  title,
                  style: AppTextStyles.labelMedium.copyWith(
                    color: AppColors.textGray,
                  ),
                ),
                const SizedBox(height: 4),
                Text(
                  amount,
                  style: AppTextStyles.titleSmall,
                ),
              ],
            ),
          ),
          Text(
            date,
            style: AppTextStyles.labelSmall,
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

class _SalarySlipData {
  final String title;
  final String amount;
  final String date;

  _SalarySlipData({
    required this.title,
    required this.amount,
    required this.date,
  });
}
